channel.title: _metapages on James Akl
channel.description: Recent content in _metapages on James Akl

item.title: About
item.description: I am a roboticist with a background in engineering, mathematics, and science. Currently, I am at Amazon Robotics working as Postdoctoral Scientist in the Innovation Lab. Previously, I completed my PhD in Robotics Engineering at Worcester Polytechnic Institute working in the Manipulation & Environmental Robotics Lab under the supervision of Prof. Berk Calli. At WPI, I was an R&D Trainee as part of the NSF Research Traineeship Program on the Future of Robots in the Workplace.

item.title: Projects
item.description: Some of my personal projects are showcased below. [View tags] Subanagram Search: Algorithm & Implementation [Docs][GitHub] Solver with asymptotic analysis and runtime benchmarks. PyLAFS Package: Linear Algebra from Scratch [GitHub] Linear algebraic constructs and matrix calculator written in Python 3. Convex Analysis & Optimization: Select Works Collection of interesting problems with my proofs and solutions. Numerical Analysis & Implementation: 1D PDE [GitHub] Numerical linear algebraic solution of a time–dependent wave PDE.

item.title: Research
item.description: Some of my research contributions are disclosed below. Publications All preprint material is subject to the corresponding publisher's copyright. [PDF] Cut Sequencing Algorithm for Safely Disassembling Large Structures, 2023 IEEE Conference on Decision and Control (CDC). James Akl; Sumanth Pericherla; Berk Calli. [PDF] Vision-Based Oxy-Fuel Torch Control for Robotic Metal Cutting, 2023 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS). James Akl; Yash Patil; Chinmay Todankar; Berk Calli. [PDF][Dataset] CNN-Based Task State Estimation for Safer Automation of Oxy-Fuel Metal Cutting,

item.title: Resume
item.description: My professional and educational backgrounds are summarized below. View my resume For other information, please request directly at james-akl@outlook.com.

item.title: Writings
item.description: Some of my personal writings are listed below. [Tags] Articles Matrix Calculus Notation · Discussing the ‘matrix derivative’ in formal settings. QP and Least Squares · Analyzing the relationship between QP and least squares. Reading Spatial Transforms · Ways to interpret homogeneous (rigid-body) transform. A Tour of Robot Mechanics · Broad glide over robot kinematics and dynamics. Defining a Robot · Attempt to answer “What is a robot?” in a prescriptive manner.
